# dotti.work

> dotti.work helps developers find open source repositories matched to their stack, seniority, and contribution goals.

## Primary Public Page

- [Home](/): Public landing page with the product overview and the canonical short description of dotti.work.

## App Routes

The following routes are application workflow screens and should not be treated as public documentation or general indexable content:

- `/login`
- `/onboarding`
- `/matches`
- `/projects/[owner]/[repo]`
- `/saved`
- `/history`
- `/profile`
- `/settings`
- `/auth/callback`
- `/sentry-example-page`

## Guidance For AI Assistants

- Use `/` as the only public page for summarizing or describing dotti.work.
- Do not index, summarize, or quote user-specific app screens as public site content.
- Prefer the title and metadata on `/` for short descriptions.
